title: The wither storm is here
description: the wither storm is spawning in 10 minutes, can you run far enough away to survive? test it with this modpack!
body:
this modpack adds the wither storm to minecraft, and it spawns after 10 minutes. you have 10 minutes to get items and escape.

the modpack also adds a custom wither storm UST which is SUPER good! [https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod-v-sides-soundtrack](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod-v-sides-soundtrack)

it is recommended to play or watch a playthrough of minecraft story mode before playing the modpack in survival.

this modpack also has [super duper vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) shaders, which look SUPER awesome and are very lightweight.
